a.xlink:title: Creates a circular icon filled with the specified color.
Retrieves a card by its exact name.
Returns the CardDatabaseQuerier of the singleton database.
Returns the querier for performing card lookups.
Returns a printing of a card from the same set as another given printing when possible.
Converts a CardRef into an ExactCard.
Returns a reference to the underlying CardInfo object.
Convenience helper to get the card's display name.
Populates the menu with an action for each active player.
